item.title: Find safety and income in these tax-exempt bonds as the Iran war stirs up the market
item.description: Rates on municipal bonds moved higher this week, which many see as an opportunity to lock in yields and stabilize portfolios.

item.title: The charts are showing oil may have overextended higher, says Carter Worth
item.description: Carter Worth looks through the charts in oil after a wild week.

item.title: Greg Abel makes his first big moves as Berkshire Hathaway CEO. Is it time to buy back in?
item.description: While the steps were viewed as positive signals, analysts said they are unlikely to materially alter their outlook for the shares.

item.title: Market turmoil is hitting most traditional safe havens. UBS says this is the place to hide
item.description: Pharmaceutical stocks like Eli Lilly and Merck are good places to help investors ride out a recent rise in geopolitical turmoil, according to UBS.

item.title: The consumer stocks primed to be big winners from AI, according to Jefferies
item.description: Jefferies believes that retail companies adopting AI to increase product innovation and personalization are deepening their economic moats.
